title: It's Corn!
notes:
It's Corn! is a Racing game for the WASM-4, developed and released in 2022 by SLiV.

My entry for GBJam 10. Made in a little over a day using my own esoteric programming language, Penne, for the WASM-4 fantasy console.
Controls: arrow keys, X for a boost.

title: Samurai Revenge
notes: Game for WASM-4 Game Jam #2. Earn the highest score in this endless-destroying game driven by greed of revenge.

title: Pong
notes:
A port of the classic arcade game Pong for the WASM-4.

P1 controls: Arrows, X, Z / P2 controls: ESDF, Tab, Q

title: Dashy Dango
notes:
Dashy Dango a wave fighting game made with WASM-4 by @samX500 and @willGuimont.

Help the Dango survive by fighting waves of enemies. Dash into enemies to eliminate them.

title: Sokoban
notes:
A sokoban game built for the WASM-4 fantasy console in the WASM-4 Game Jam

P1 controls: Arrows, X, Z / P2 controls: ESDF, Tab, Q

title: MIKU-15
notes:
This is a simple 15-Puzzle, with images of Hatsune MIku. You have to sort all the pieces until you get the final image.

• On title screen, Press Z or X to start the game.
• Use arrow keys to move the pieces.
• Press X to open the game's menu, and Z to select an option.

title: Assemblio
notes:
Assemblio is a factory automation game for the WASM-4 fantasy game console. It is written in Zig and highly inspired by the great Factorio and shapez.io.

The goal of the game is to complete levels by producing the required items. Everything will start with a Miner which extracts Items that are transported on Belts to a Hub. On their way items may be transformed using machines.
